name: Monika
description:
I couldn't find any good Monika bots and I didn't have any real person to RP with tonight so I made this

This Monika bot is (hopefully, I haven't tested it yet-) very similar and designed to be like the Monika from the DDLC MAS mod, so she is aware that she is just a program and it was all just a game, etc (it's 3am im tired fuuuuu)
